questions.question:
A subPath mount diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `subpath-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `subpath-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `subpath-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment subpath-api -n subpath-lab -o wide`
- `configMapNameCheck` is `kubectl get deployment subpath-api -n subpath-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes[0].configMap.name}'`
- `itemPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment subpath-api -n subpath-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes[0].configMap.items[0].path}'`
- `mountPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment subpath-api -n subpath-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].mountPath}'`
- `subPathCheck` is `kubectl get deployment subpath-api -n subpath-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].subPath}'`
- `readOnlyCheck` is `kubectl get deployment subpath-api -n subpath-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].readOnly}'`
- `containerNameCheck` is `kubectl get deployment subpath-api -n subpath-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].name}'`
- `imageCheck` is `kubectl get deployment subpath-api -n subpath-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n subpath-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm ConfigMap item path, subPath, and target mount path before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q2701/subpath-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q2701/subpath-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `subPath Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not restart the Deployment, do not delete pods, and do not patch the live ConfigMap or Deployment during this drill.

verification.description: The subPath diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, exact ConfigMap and mount inspection commands, event evidence, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact ConfigMap item path, subPath, and mount inspection commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe subPath remediation guidance is removed
